title: Dense Romantic Slovakian Chestnut Mushroom Gratin
description: A rich and earthy gratin featuring chestnut mushrooms, perfect for a romantic dinner, with a dense and herbal flavor profile, this dish is also onion and garlic free, making it suitable for those with sensitivities.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Butter four ramekins and set them aside.
In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat and add the sliced mushrooms, cooking until they release their moisture and start to brown.
Add the heavy cream to the skillet and stir to combine, bringing the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the mixture cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the shredded gruyere cheese until it is fully melted and the mixture is smooth.
Add the chopped thyme, salt, and pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Divide the mushroom mixture among the prepared ramekins, topping each one with a sprinkle of additional gruyere cheese.
Sprinkle a pinch of flour over the top of each ramekin to help brown the cheese.
Place the ramekins on a baking sheet and bake for 20 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the gratin is heated through.
